positive: A highly detailed, mystical illustration featuring bioluminescent celestial flora blooming around a central stylized mountain range. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Japanese woodblock print aesthetics, resulting in clean silhouettes and rich, deep contrast. Use a limited color palette of indigo, luminous teal, pale gold, and deep emerald. Composition must be symmetrical, centered, and visually impactful, suitable for a repeating textile pattern or large apparel print. Focus on stylized detail, glowing elements, and crisp outlines, rendered with perfect linework, no gradients needed for the main shapes.
negative: blurry, sketch, painting, watercolor, lowres, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, logo, text, lettering, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, poorly drawn, grayscale, messy background, unreadable details
